creator: oyvindmo@initio.no
text:
The included shell archive is a port of the CDDB_get.pm Perl module.
It is yet another interface to CDDB.

Currently the audio/ripit port is broken if using audio/xmcd newer than
about a month, because of format changes in the cda TOC output.
An upgrade of the ripit port from 1.8 to 2.0 fixes this by removing
the dependency on audio/xmcd, instead using CDDB_get.pm.

For an upgrade of the ripit port, see another PR.  (Will be submitted a
few minutes after this one.)
